response.justification: Despite extensive full-stack experience, the candidate lacks direct C++ or Rust experience in geospatial routing pipelines, which are core requirements; their work with DLang and Node.js is unrelated to navigation data tiling, and there is no evidence of distributed systems, fault tolerance, or real-time traffic integration experience critical to the role.
strengths: Strong full-stack engineering background across multiple domains
Proven experience with open-source geospatial platforms (GISCollective)
Demonstrated ability to learn and contribute across diverse tech stacks
concerns: No demonstrated experience with C++ or Rust in production routing or geospatial systems
Lacks evidence of distributed systems, consistency, or low-latency data pipeline design
Geospatial work is NGO-focused and not tied to commercial navigation routing or tile optimization

key_factors.factor: Lack of C++/Rust in routing context
No geospatial tiling or navigation pipeline experience
